temples.name: Hanuman Tok
temples.description: A Hanuman temple complex in the upper reaches of Gangtok.

temples.name: Rumtek Monastery
temples.description: A major Buddhist monastery near Gangtok and an important seat of the Karma Kagyu tradition.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow site-specific rules at the entrance.

temples.name: Kirateshwar Mahadev Temple

temples.name: Pemayangtse Monastery

temples.name: Siddhesvara Dham
temples.deity: Lord Shiva and Char Dham replicas
temples.description: A pilgrimage complex near Namchi with a large Shiva statue and replicas of the four dhams.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow site-specific rules at the entrance.
